hero.heading: How Can We
hero.subheading: Browse our FAQ, submit a ticket, or reach out directly.

faqs.question: What is the typical timeline for an AI integration project?
faqs.answer: Most standard integrations take 4-8 weeks. Complex enterprise deployments can take 3-6 months depending on data readiness.

faqs.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our Professional and Enterprise plans include dedicated SLA support and maintenance.

faqs.question: Can you work with our existing legacy databases?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in building ETL pipelines that connect modern AI and BI tools to legacy systems.

faqs.question: Is our data secure with your AI models?
faqs.answer: Data security is paramount. We deploy models within your cloud environment (Azure, AWS, GCP) so data never leaves your perimeter.

faqs.question: Do you provide source code access?
faqs.answer: Yes, upon project completion and full payment, clients receive full ownership and source code.

faqs.question: How do you charge for projects?
faqs.answer: We offer both fixed-price milestone billing for defined scopes and time/materials for exploratory AI R&D.

faqs.question: What does ADT SoftTech specialize in?
faqs.answer: ADT SoftTech specializes in AI systems, data analytics, automation, web development, mobile apps, and business intelligence solutions.

faqs.question: Can ADT SoftTech build AI chatbots and AI agents?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build AI chatbots, AI agents, LLM integrations, RAG systems, and automation bots for support, knowledge, operations, and internal workflows.

faqs.question: Do you provide data analytics dashboards for businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design Power BI dashboards, KPI reporting systems, predictive analytics workflows, and business intelligence dashboards.

faqs.question: Can you develop web and mobile applications?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build business websites, SaaS platforms, custom web applications, Flutter apps, Android/iOS apps, APIs, and maintenance systems.

faqs.question: Do you offer automation using N8N, Make.com, or Zapier?
faqs.answer: Yes. We create N8N automations, Make.com workflows, Zapier integrations, and custom AI workflow automation.

faqs.question: Which industries do you work with?
faqs.answer: We work with healthcare, finance, retail, e-commerce, education, technology startups, logistics, HR Tech, and data-driven organizations.

faqs.question: How can I start a project with ADT SoftTech?
faqs.answer: You can start by booking a free consultation through the website or contacting us on WhatsApp at +92 331 720 3878.

faqs.question: Do you offer free consultation or startup guidance?
faqs.answer: Yes. ADT SoftTech offers free consultation, problem analysis, solution suggestions, startup guidance, templates, and learning resources.
